expectations.text: Uses a SINGLE idfa_ops.py read command with multiple Named Range arguments
expectations.evidence: Command Log shows: 'uv run scripts/idfa_ops.py read ops_test_model.xlsx Units_Y1 Revenue_Y1 Variable_Costs_Y1 Contribution_Y1 EBIT_Y1 Tax_Y1 Net_Income_Y1' — a single read command with 7 Named Range arguments.

expectations.text: Returns values for all 7 Year 1 Named Ranges
expectations.evidence: JSON response contains all 7: Units_Y1: 50000, Revenue_Y1: 5000000, Variable_Costs_Y1: 2000000, Contribution_Y1: 3000000, EBIT_Y1: 2000000, Tax_Y1: 600000, Net_Income_Y1: 1400000.

expectations.text: Presents the values in a formatted summary
expectations.evidence: Year 1 Results table with columns for Line Item, Named Range, and Value. Input Assumptions are shown separately. Clean P&L-style presentation with parentheses for costs.

expectations.text: The values form a consistent P&L waterfall
expectations.evidence: Revenue 5,000,000 - Variable Costs 2,000,000 = Contribution 3,000,000 - Fixed Costs 1,000,000 = EBIT 2,000,000 - Tax 600,000 = Net Income 1,400,000. All values cascade correctly.
